description: Video recommendation algorithm based on readiness assessment results for comparing and ordering 5-digit numbers

excellent_performance.rationale: Student has excellent comparison and ordering skills with 4-digit numbers, can fast-track to 5-digit with challenge

ready_performance.rationale: Student is ready, provide complete coverage of comparing and ordering 5-digit numbers

partial_readiness.rationale: Student has gaps in comparing/ordering 4-digit numbers, needs targeted review before 5-digit

adaptiveLogic.description: Select prerequisite videos based on specific weak concepts

exampleSequence.reason: Review: Using place value to compare

not_ready.rationale: Student needs significant review of comparing and ordering 4-digit numbers before attempting 5-digit

postPlaylistAction.message: After watching these prerequisite videos, retake the readiness quiz to check if you're ready to continue with comparing and ordering 5-digit numbers.

conceptBasedRemediation.description: Map specific weak concepts to remedial videos

ordering_basics.conceptName: Ordering numbers in ascending and descending order

pv_comparison.conceptName: Using place value to compare numbers

comprehensionCheckpoints.description: Quick checks during video watching to adjust playlist

ifAllCorrect.message: Excellent! You can compare 5-digit numbers correctly.

questions.question: Arrange in ascending order: 45,678; 45,234; 45,890
questions.explanation: Ascending means smallest to largest. Compare hundreds: 2 < 6 < 8.

ifWrong.message: Practice ordering more numbers before continuing

skip_ahead.action: Skip mixed practice, jump to challenge

add_support.action: Pause main topic, insert prerequisite review on comparison basics

suggest_break.trigger: After 4 videos watched in a single session
suggest_break.action: Suggest taking a 5-minute break before continuing

recommend_practice.trigger: Student completes videos but scores < 70% on checkpoint
recommend_practice.action: Recommend practicing with parent/teacher using flashcards or comparison games

recommend_retake.trigger: Student in not_ready category completes all prerequisite videos
recommend_retake.action: Strongly recommend retaking readiness assessment before main content

high_score.message: Excellent! You can compare and order 4-digit numbers confidently. You're ready to learn 5-digit comparison and ordering. We've created a fast-track playlist with challenge content.

good_score.message: Good work! You understand comparing and ordering. Let's extend these skills to 5-digit numbers with complete coverage.

partial_score.message: You have some gaps in comparing or ordering numbers. Don't worry! We'll start with targeted review videos on the concepts you need, then move to 5-digit numbers.

low_score.message: You need to review comparing and ordering 4-digit numbers first. We've created a playlist focused on building strong foundation. After watching, you can retake the quiz and then learn 5-digit skills.

conceptProgressionMap.description: Shows how comparing and ordering skills build on each other

playlistCompletion.description: % of students who watch >= 80% of recommended videos

practiceQuizPassRate.description: % of students who score >= 75% on practice quiz after watching playlist

videoRelevanceRating.description: Average student rating (out of 5) for playlist helpfulness

timeToMastery.description: Average minutes from readiness quiz to practice quiz pass

comparisonAccuracy.description: % of students who can correctly compare 5-digit numbers

orderingAccuracy.description: % of students who can correctly order 3-4 numbers in ascending/descending

implementationNotes.recommendedValidation: Test with 15-20 Grade 4 students across all readiness levels

expectedOutcomes.excellent_students: Complete in 35-40 minutes with 90-100% practice quiz score
expectedOutcomes.ready_students: Complete in 35-40 minutes with 80-90% practice quiz score
expectedOutcomes.partial_students: Complete in 45-50 minutes with 70-80% practice quiz score (after prerequisite review)
expectedOutcomes.not_ready_students: Require prerequisite review (40 min) + retake + main content (25 min) = 65-75 total minutes, expected 60-75% on practice quiz

commonChallenges.challenge1: Students comparing from right to left instead of left to right
commonChallenges.solution1: Emphasize starting from highest place value, use visual place value charts
commonChallenges.challenge2: Students confusing ascending and descending order
commonChallenges.solution2: Use memory aids: ascending = going up (like climbing), descending = going down
commonChallenges.challenge3: Students making errors with zeros in comparison
commonChallenges.solution3: Reinforce that 0 is less than any other digit, practice with multiple zero examples
